channel.title: Learning on programmerraja blog
channel.description: Recent content in Learning on programmerraja blog

item.title: System Design Case study
item.description: Database Scalling Shopfiy they started off by splitting the primary database into separate parts They identified groups of large tables that could exist on separate databases, and used GhostFerry to move a few tables onto a new database. This scaling approach is referred to as “federation” where tables are stored in different MySQLs As the app further grew, they were starting to hit the limit of a single MySQL.disk size take many Terabytes.
